description: Remove dead code and fix Retry-After header parsing in the Jira plugin.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/jira && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Remove unused getAccountId export and fix Retry-After parsing in Jira API
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the Jira plugin to have no dead code and correct Retry-After header parsing so that the codebase stays clean and AI agents receive valid retry timing metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: The getAccountId function (lines 66-70) is removed from jira-api.ts
No other file in the Jira plugin imports getAccountId
Line ~123 in jira-api.ts uses parseRetryAfterMs from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk instead of `Number(retryAfter) * 1000`
The import for parseRetryAfterMs is added to the existing @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk import line
cd plugins/jira && npm run build passes
cd plugins/jira && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/jira && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/jira && npm run format:check passes
